# Copilot instructions: DKAN 4.x + Drupal AI + MCP Server + DKAN core + open-data/DCAT-US metadata

This repository packages skills, reference docs, and scaffolding procedures for
writing custom Drupal modules that extend DKAN 4.x, the Drupal AI module
(`drupal/ai`, `ai_agents`), and the MCP Server module (`drupal/mcp_server`),
plus contributing to DKAN core itself (the `drupal/dkan` package) and authoring
open-data metadata (DCAT-US / Project Open Data).
Canonical source lives under `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/`.

Path-scoped instructions in `.github/instructions/` auto-attach when you edit
matching files. Reusable procedures are in `.github/prompts/` (run with `/<name>`).
For the full picture see [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md).

When working on DKAN, Drupal-AI, or MCP Server module code, consult the reference
docs under `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/*/reference/` — they carry version-specific specifics
(DKAN 4.x `Drupal\dkan_*` namespaces, `drupal/ai 1.3.x` lifecycle, `mcp_server`/
`mcp/sdk` 0.6 volatility) that prevent common mistakes.
